name: Nate Parker

acts.description: 1999 rape accusation, acquitted at trial; accuser died by suicide in 2012; co-defendant Jean Celestin was convicted

behavior_summary: Acquitted of rape in 1999 while at Penn State. Co-accused Jean Celestin was convicted. The accuser later took her own life. Parker's Birth of a Nation premiere at Sundance 2016 was derailed when the case resurfaced.

art.summary: The Birth of a Nation was a Sundance sensation before the past resurfaced. His career has not recovered.

verdict.blurb: Acquitted is not the same as innocent. His accuser is dead. He gave interviews about how difficult the experience was for him.
